entry: Log entry: Our champion mr_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability, and we won 67% of the last 24h of closed trades. No overclaiming, no faked wins — just one more truthful day of measurement.
good_signals: our champion MR_d3_t3_s2 is holding strong at 86/100 survivability
we won 67% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +1.048%/trade

what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
